title: LIPA Sixth Form College (Liverpool): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: LIPA Sixth Form College  URN: 142891  Notice issued to: The LIPA Multi Academy Trust  Reason for issue: ‘Inadequate’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Vicky Beer  DfE regional director office: North West  Local authority: Liverpool City Council  "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
